title: Counting in Nature
subject: Mathematics
description: Learn to count items found around the campsite.

questions.question: How many acorns do you see if there is 1 on the rock and 1 in your hand?
If we see 3 birds in the tree and 2 fly away, how many birds are left in the tree?
Count the tents: 🏕️ 🏕️ 🏕️. How many tents are there?
